mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_board ( board_id, product_name, product_link, product_image, category1, category2 ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{productName}, #{productLink}, #{productImage}, #{category1}, #{category2} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.board_id, m.username, mem.nickname, m.title, m.content, m.created_at, m.edited_at, m.view_cnt, m.like_cnt, m.reply_cnt, r.product_name, r.product_link, r.product_image, r.category1, r.category2 FROM master_board m INNER JOIN review_board r on m.board_id = r.board_id INNER JOIN member mem on m.username = mem.username WHERE m.board_type = 'REVIEW' ORDER BY m.board_id desc;

SELECT m.board_id, m.username, mem.nickname, m.title, m.content, m.created_at, m.edited_at, m.view_cnt, m.like_cnt, m.reply_cnt, r.product_name, r.product_link, r.product_image, r.category1, r.category2 FROM master_board m INNER JOIN review_board r ON m.board_id = r.board_id INNER JOIN member mem ON m.username = mem.username WHERE m.board_id = #{boardId}
SELECT board_id, file_id, original_name, saved_name, file_path, file_type, file_size FROM board_file where board_id = #{boardId}
